close_reason: TypeScript support implemented via nix-backed prelude with typescript_library/typescript_binary rules and tsc from Nix
description:
Implement proper TypeScript/JavaScript support beyond genrule approach.

Current state:
- Using genrule for tsc compilation
- No native ts_binary or ts_library rules

Required work:
1. Understand Buck2 js_library worker model
2. Create worker tool for TypeScript compilation
3. Implement ts_library and ts_binary rules
4. Support npm dependencies via node_modules or vendoring

Reference: Buck2 prelude js/ directory uses worker-based execution
See: examples/typescript-hello/ for current genrule approach
title: TypeScript: native Buck2 toolchain support
